'''hanutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecotroph|cecotroph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecotroph|cecotroph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hanutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænitith|hænitith]] || [[word:hænitij|hænitij]] || [[word:hænitish|hænitish]] || [[word:hæniti|hæniti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanunututh|hanunututh]] || [[word:hanunutuj|hanunutuj]] || [[word:hanunutush|hanunutush]] || [[word:hanunutu|hanunutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanututh|hanututh]] || [[word:hanutuj|hanutuj]] || [[word:hanutush|hanutush]] || [[word:hanutu|hanutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanuftuth|hanuftuth]] || [[word:hanuftuj|hanuftuj]] || [[word:hanuftush|hanuftush]] || [[word:hanuftuf|hanuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanututhu|hanututhu]] || [[word:hanutuju|hanutuju]] || [[word:hanutushu|hanutushu]] || [[word:hanutuku|hanutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanututh|hanututh]] || [[word:hanutuj|hanutuj]] || [[word:hanutush|hanutush]] || [[word:hanutu|hanutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanututhul|hanututhul]] || [[word:hanutujul|hanutujul]] || [[word:hanutushul|hanutushul]] || [[word:hanutukul|hanutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanututhuthu|hanututhuthu]] || [[word:hanutujuju|hanutujuju]] || [[word:hanutushushu|hanutushushu]] || [[word:hanutuku|hanutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanututhun|hanututhun]] || [[word:hanutujun|hanutujun]] || [[word:hanutushun|hanutushun]] || [[word:hanutukun|hanutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanututhuoro|hanututhuoro]] || [[word:hanutujuoro|hanutujuoro]] || [[word:hanutushuoro|hanutushuoro]] || [[word:hanutukuoro|hanutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
